games.title: Cooties
games.blurb: Physics-driven multiplayer mayhem. Dodge the outbreak, shove your friends, and whatever you do, don't catch the cooties.

games.title: Farwild
games.blurb: Venture deep into a vast, untamed wilderness. Explore sprawling terrain, live off the land, and see how far into the wild you can go.

games.title: Mini Marchers
games.blurb: Command tiny troops as they march into battle. Pint-sized soldiers, full-sized strategy.

games.title: MPDC
games.blurb: A compact and mysterious experiment. Jump in and see what MPDC has in store.

games.title: Prop Hunt
games.blurb: Classic hide-and-seek with a twist: disguise yourself as an everyday object and blend in, or hunt down the props before time runs out.

games.title: Protocol TD
games.blurb: Defend the network in this tower defense. Route power, place turrets, and hold the line against the incoming breach.

games.title: Survival Idle
games.blurb: Gather, build, and automate. An idle survival game that keeps on working even when you aren't.

games.title: uMORPG
games.blurb: A homegrown MMORPG experiment. Create a hero and wander a persistent online world of your own making.
